{{CargoRelic
|name=Bird Incubator
|class_id=20363
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=It's an incubator that adopts many unknown technologies to combine magic and science. Some of the components are even made by Gods. Its performance is also top-notch. All you need to do is put the eggs in it, then it will hatch perfectly, not only with a 100% success rate but also with the ability to nourish the eggs, thereby greatly improving the hatching efficiency!
|fame=12
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Egg hatching rate +0.4%
|ss2=Egg hatching rate +0.8%
|ss3=Egg hatching rate +1.2%
|ss4=Egg hatching rate +1.2%
|ss7=Egg hatching rate +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
